text: Good morning Jarvis! Any major events scheduled for today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Saturday, June 08. No work meetings today. You have working on the garage cabinetry and gardening in the front walkway.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Doing some cleaning around the house. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. It is running much better now.
title: Household Update

text: Let's get that resolved. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. The automations are running now.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Quick log: Sarah found a new recipe to try. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Yum, that sounds delicious! Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Jarvis, Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Ethan is practicing Minuet in G for the upcoming piano recital. Feeling good about their progress.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Logged that. Sounds exciting! He's making fast progress. I can set a practice timer to help him prepare. Would you like me to update the family calendar?
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick log: Reading a new book before bed. My starting running back is questionable. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. I've adjusted the local settings. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. I've saved the reading stats.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Quick update: Planning a street block party soon. We played Catan and Dave Nguyen won at the end. Good to stay in touch with everyone.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Social breaks are great. Catan matches are always competitive. Dave must have rolled well. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick log: Lily refused to eat her dinner today. Ethan wants to play Roblox instead of doing his reading. We need to stay consistent with them.
title: Parenting Update

text: Understood. Toddlers are full of energy. A 'homework first, then Roblox' rule helps balance screen time. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update: The kitchen sink area has a problem. The HVAC has been running constantly and upstairs is warm. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Interesting. Good call on checking that. A clogged HVAC filter reduces airflow. I'll note it on our maintenance log. I can check local hardware store stock.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Sarah found a new recipe to try. We need to stock up on milk, coffee, and chicken. That should cover us for the week.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Meal planning saves so much time. I've updated the Costco list and added diapers as we're running low. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Quick update: Lily had her gymnastics class at the community center. Lily's gymnastics class signup opens online tomorrow. Always coordinate calendars for these.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sounds exciting! I've added the signup time to your alerts so you can secure a spot. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Jarvis, Enjoying a cold beer on the deck. The weather tonight in Frisco is perfect. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Relaxation mode active. You've earned it! Friday deck relaxation is the best way to spend the evening. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Played golf with Jake Morrison today. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. Looking forward to the weekend.
title: Social Update

text: Understood. I've mapped the locations. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. Enjoy the craft beer!
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Jarvis, Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. She had a massive tantrum about brushing her teeth. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Good planning. Tantrums are tough at age 3. Turning brushing into a game or song might help. Rest well tonight.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Quick update before bed, logging the journal. Good weekend progress on home projects. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
